form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Wentworth Park over 520m in 29.62 last start, beating Magic Bandit. Likes the rails so has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.31) behind Aston Rayner in a OPEN on March 7. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.31) behind Aston Rayner in a OPEN on March 7. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 515m at Sandown in a handy 29.38 beating Paw Fabian. In a purple patch of form and likely to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 520m at this track. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at Shepparton. That followed a win two back in 24.83 beating Dapper Chap over 450m at Shepparton. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at Shepparton. That followed a win two back in 24.83 beating Dapper Chap over 450m at Shepparton. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 600m at The Meadows in a handy (34.24), beating Vista Weird. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 29.41. Must include.

form.formComment: Was edged out last time at Sandown when beaten just half a length but did clock a hot 29.41 for the 515m trip. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was edged out last time at Sandown when beaten just half a length but did clock a hot 29.41 for the 515m trip. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.40) at this track in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Strong record off the draw with five wins and two minors from eight starts. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 3rd over 520m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (30.08) behind Tarawi in a Free For All on April 11. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 2.5 lengths in a Mix 3/4 last start at Sandown, recording a powerful 29.40 over the 515m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance.
